title: Smoky Creamy Filipino Tofu Stew
description: A comforting, smoky tofu stew infused with Filipino flavors, creamy coconut milk, and aromatic garlic granules that simmer into a fragrant, vegan-friendly meal.
instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the diced onion and sauté until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Stir in the garlic granules and smoked paprika, cooking for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the sliced carrot and bell pepper, cooking for 2 minutes.
Pour in the vegetable stock and bring to a gentle simmer.
Gently add the tofu cubes, ensuring they are submerged.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and let simmer for 15 minutes.
Stir in the coconut milk and soy sauce, then simmer uncovered for an additional 5 minutes, allowing flavors to meld.
Finish with a splash of lime juice and adjust seasoning with extra soy sauce if needed.
Serve hot over steamed rice or with crusty bread for a cozy meal.
